overview.description: Prague-based AI consulting and product company delivering machine learning solutions to enterprises
overview.description_long: Blindspot Solutions (trading as Blindspot AI) is a Prague-based AI company that helps businesses harness the power of artificial intelligence through a combination of ready-made AI products and bespoke consulting. They offer 9 off-the-shelf AI products covering anomaly detection (ADF), fraud detection (ML FDS), intelligent video analysis (MACULA), customer support automation (ARESPO), smart document reading (ReeDee), and four optimization tools (OptiSuite, OptiFit, OptiPlan, OptiRoute). The company also delivers custom AI-powered software development and consulting engagements. Founded in 2014 and a member of Adastra Group since 2017. Ranked among the top 3 fastest-growing companies in Central Europe by Deloitte Fast 50 in both 2019 and 2020.
overview.tagline: We help companies unlock business value through artificial intelligence

history.origin_story: Founded on 11 March 2014 in Prague by three co-founders with backgrounds in applied AI research and software engineering. Became a member of Adastra Group in 2017, expanding its reach for multinational enterprise engagements.
key_milestones: 2014: Founded as Blindspot Solutions s.r.o. in Prague (IČO 02758784)
2017: Joined Adastra Group as a member company
2019: Named top-3 fastest-growing company in Central Europe — Deloitte Technology Fast 50
2020: Repeated top-3 ranking in Deloitte Technology Fast 50 CE

leadership.name: Štěpán Kopřiva
leadership.role: Co-founder & CEO of Adastra Czech Republic

notable_clients: Technology Centre of the Czech Academy of Sciences

sources_used: ares.gov.cz (Czech business registry — founding date, legal name, address)
glassdoor.com (company ID identified from search results HTML; page blocked)
metadata.notes: Legal name is Blindspot Solutions s.r.o. (IČO 02758784). The website branding uses 'Blindspot AI' and 'Blindspot.AI'. Company has been a member of Adastra Group since 2017 — categorised as 'acquired'. The co-founder Michal Pěchouček is listed on the website as 'CTO of Gen' (a cybersecurity firm), indicating he has moved on from active Blindspot leadership. Employee count of 70 is from the website's own stats counter ('Experts' metric). Founding date of 2014-03-11 confirmed via Czech ARES business registry.
